examples: Acetylcholine is also the principal neurotransmitter in all autonomic ganglia.
The three major forms in people with diabetes are peripheral neuropathy, autonomic neuropathy, and mononeuropathy.
These are the autonomic and somatic nervous systems.
Within the next decade, I predict that IT departments will be almost entirely managed by autonomic expert systems.
Autonomic systems would bear more of a resemblance to simple biological organisms than a fully fledged, HAL-style artificial intelligence.
